goal: Python binding via pybind11 wrapping libax_asr_api.so, with AX_ASR class, packaged as whl

requirement_alignment.api_surface: AX_ASR class with transcribe_file, transcribe_pcm, context manager
requirement_alignment.first_iteration: pybind11 binding layer + AX_ASR class + wheel build config

assumptions: libax_asr_api.so available at build time via AX_ASR_LIB_DIR
